---
title: "Projects"
---

## Early-Career Data Skills Intelligence
**Tools:** Python (pandas), R (tidyverse/ggplot2)  
**Focus:** early-career skills demand + skill “stacks” using co-occurrence and lift analysis.

- Repo: https://github.com/Lucas-Gates/<YOUR-REPO-NAME>
- Key figures:

![](assets/early-career-skills/top_20_skills.png)

![](assets/early-career-skills/top_lift_pairs.png)
